## Data Safety Checklist

- [ ] I removed passwords, tokens, API keys, kubeconfigs, private keys, and SSH details.
- [ ] I removed or anonymized customer names, hostnames, cluster names, and internal IPs.
- [ ] I did not attach raw `.local/incidents/` output or production logs.
- [ ] I used example values where possible.
